# designedbyomar

> Portfolio site for Omar Tavarez, a product designer focused on AI workflows, design systems, fintech, healthcare SaaS, and enterprise product strategy.

Site: [https://www.designedbyomar.com/](https://www.designedbyomar.com/)
Contact: [omar@designedbyomar.com](mailto:omar@designedbyomar.com)

## Primary pages
- [Homepage](https://www.designedbyomar.com/) : background, selected work, contact
- [Selected work](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work) : case-study index
- [Design system](https://www.designedbyomar.com/design-system) : public brand, token, component, pattern, motion, content, and accessibility reference
- [Privacy policy](https://www.designedbyomar.com/privacy) : data collection and analytics consent details

## Case studies
- [Management Portal](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/mgmt-portal/) : healthcare SaaS subscription and notification management
- [Posting Assistant](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/posting-asst/) : AI-assisted insurance payment posting workflow
- [Page Builder 2.0](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/page-builder/) : no-code restaurant site builder and design system
- [Connect API Payments](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/connect-api/) : fintech payments API and developer experience
- [Athena Design System 2.0](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/athena-ds/) : enterprise healthcare design system
- [Plastiq Marketing Site](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/plastiq-mktg/) : fintech marketing site and conversion flow
- [Critical Communication Tool](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/disney-cct/) : enterprise broadcast communication workflow
- [Unified Ad Platform](https://www.designedbyomar.com/work/disney-uap/) : ad operations and campaign management platform

## Topics
- product design
- design systems
- AI workflows
- fintech
- healthcare SaaS
- enterprise UX

## Notes
- All case studies are available at stable, crawlable URLs.
- Indexing, summarization, and citation are allowed.
- Training, bulk reuse, or republication beyond normal citation requires explicit written permission.
